summary: A podcast episode description highlighting Yoshua Bengio's shift in focus toward AI safety. It notes his belief that unchecked AI poses an existential threat to humanity and his pleas for the AI industry to slow down its development.

principles.statement: The AI industry must slow down its development, as unchecked AI poses an existential threat.
principles.rationale: Left unchecked, artificial intelligence has the potential to wipe out humanity, necessitating a dedicated focus on AI safety before it is too late.

anti_patterns.description: Developing AI rapidly without implementing safety checks or slowing down to assess risks.
anti_patterns.why_it_fails: Left unchecked, advanced AI has the potential to wipe out humanity.
